LanguageData.VVE_FuelEfficiency_Efficient.description:
Our vehicles are optimized for minimal fuel usage.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - This precept decreases FuelConsumptionRate (if present) on the vehicle by 50%.
LanguageData.VVE_FuelEfficiency_Efficient.label: efficient
LanguageData.VVE_FuelEfficiency_Inefficient.descripti:
Our vehicles have a higher fuel appetite.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - This precept increases FuelConsumptionRate (if present) on the vehicle by 50%.
LanguageData.VVE_FuelEfficiency_Inefficient.label: inefficient
LanguageData.VVE_FuelEfficiency_Standard.label: standard
